RT by @CivilDefenceAD: RT by @CivilDefenceAD: Teams from Abu Dhabi Police and Abu Dhabi Civil Defence Authority have controlled a fire that broke out Friday morning at the Carpet Souk near Zayed Port in Abu Dhabi. Cooling and smoke extraction operations are underway, with no injuries reported, whilst traffic in the area is flowing normally. Abu Dhabi Police urges the public to obtain information from official sources only.

Ahmed bin Mohammed chairs a meeting of the Dubai Media Council and approves the launch of ‘Dubai Business’, a business media platform that will be launched under Dubai Media Incorporated. The strategic initiative is designed to strengthen Dubai’s position in the global media landscape and communicate the emirate’s economic vision to international audiences. It reflects Dubai’s growing stature as one of the world’s leading economic centres and supports the objectives of the Dubai Economic Agenda, D33.
